leaderboardHiddenMessage: Leaderboard is Closed! Check back after we are finished!

guidelines.title: Original Work
guidelines.text: All submitted games must be created during the jam period and must follow the official Unify Awards rules.

guidelines.title: Team Size
guidelines.text: Teams may work solo or in groups. Every team member must be credited properly.

guidelines.title: Submission Deadline
guidelines.text: Projects must be submitted before the countdown reaches zero. Late submissions may not be counted.

guidelines.title: Respect
guidelines.text: All participants must be respectful. Harassment, stealing work, or breaking rules can lead to disqualification.

information.title: About UnifyAwards 2026
information.text: Unify Awards is a polished game jam and awards event where developers create, submit, and showcase their games. Compete for placements, prizes, recognition, and a spot on the official leaderboard.
